bullets: Spearheaded alpha testing for the WalletGyde chatbot, establishing rigorous benchmarks for reasoning depth, grounded accuracy, and tool-calling reliability across diverse financial personas.
Architected feedback loops to drive measurable improvements in Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and system logic, reducing failure modes by identifying complex edge cases and behavioral patterns.
Orchestrated collaboration between Engineering and Data teams to align model behavior with financial compliance standards, ensuring high-integrity user experiences and beta-readiness.
Built end-to-end NLP system fine-tuning transformer models (T5, BART, GPT-2) for code generation with custom PyTorch training pipelines
Engineered RAG architecture with vector embeddings and semantic search, achieving 23% accuracy improvement
Curating multi-modal datasets combining natural language, hardware configs, and sensor data for vision-language models
Benchmarked GPT-4, Qwen3, GLM-4.5, Grok-2 on 12,000+ clinical queries using MedESQ framework
Achieved 114% accuracy improvement (35% → 75%) via ReAct prompting and structured reasoning chain optimization
Developed evaluation methodologies for robust AI architectures in healthcare NoSQL systems
Deployed production Pix2Pix GAN pipeline processing 28,000+ medical images achieving 18% SSIM improvement
Architected hybrid GAN with SPADE for organ segmentation achieving 92% Dice coefficient on breast CT scans
Reduced inference time 40% through TensorRT optimization and model compression
Built automated ML deployment pipelines serving 50,000+ users with Docker, Kubernetes, Terraform — 98% uptime
Reduced p99 latency 35% (450ms → 180ms) via model quantization, caching, and horizontal scaling on AWS
Implemented blue-green deployment strategies for zero-downtime releases
